name: kmd
description: kmd — Knowledge MarkDown. Operate a markdown knowledge base (Obsidian-compatible, the LLM-wiki pattern): the kmd-ingest write protocol and kmd-lint health checks as skills, operator/librarian/intake agents, and hooks that enforce KB invariants (generated INDEX.md, append-only LOG.md and sources/) at the tool-call level. Personal-KB-first core with an opt-in org extension for agent organizations.
